name: What if claim denied because 'AI not malpractice' in my LA case?
description: Appeal with AI negligence precedents like NY sanctions.[2]

mainEntity.name: What if claim denied because 'AI not malpractice' in my LA case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal with AI negligence precedents like NY sanctions.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal denial citing NY cases holding lawyers accountable for unverified AI, proving negligence standard applies regardless of tool.[1][2] Factors: policy language, exhaustion of internal appeals. File bad faith if unreasonable denial. Switch to malpractice suit if uninsured.
